title: [WARNING] 接種疫苗或會對身體造成不必要損耗?

replies.msg:
Immune defences are undoubtedly of great benefit to the host, reducing the impact of infectious organisms. However, mounting immune responses also entails costs, which may be measured by inducing immune responses against artificial infections. We injected common eider (Somateria mollissima) females with three different non-pathogenic antigens, sheep red blood cells (SRBC), diphtheria toxoid and tetanus toxoid, early in their incubation period. In the group of females that mounted a humoral immune response against SRBC, the return rate was only 27%, whereas the group of females that did not mount a response against SRBC had a return rate of 72%. Moreover, responding against diphtheria toxoid when also responding against SRBC led to a further reduction in return rate. These results are repeatable, as the same effect occurred independently in two study years. The severely reduced return rate of females producing antibodies against SRBC and diphtheria toxoid implies that these birds experienced considerably impaired long-term survival. This study thus documents severe costs of mounting humoral immune responses in a vertebrate. Such costs may explain why many organisms suppress immunity when under stress or when malnourished, and why infections may sometimes be tolerated without eliciting immune responses.

大概意思指係歐絨鴨身上注射三種抗原，歐絨鴨既長遠存活率與所產生既免疫反應次數成反比, 從而推斷出每當身體要對抗原產生免疫反應時都會造成一定損耗

Source
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1691677/

What is NCBI
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_Center_for_Biotechnology_Informatio

如果打左支唔中既 flu vaccine, 身體就會比正常用多幾倍既 cost 去做 immune response
但即使中左，cost 都高過唔打 vaccine, 因為 vaccine 溝左其他抗原
咁樣理解應該 correct?

replies.msg: i mean other compositions of antigens

基本上你個研究只可以話, acquired immunity in experience vertebrae係有成本
而且係lab settings會降低birds既survival, likely related to consumed cost
除此以外唔可以generalised去其他statement
現實既問題如exposure rate, outcomes of infection, nutritional status等等因素都無考慮到

Acquired immunity有成本係事實
但係咪真係去到animal study既results咁, 如果唔中招就會影響埋survival
無人可以好肯定咁答

Animal study既結果有幾多可以apply返落人類又係另一個問題
生理, 結構差異唔講 本身survival已經唔同
理論上, 生長慢, 壽命生既生物, 得到aquired immunity既益處就愈大
愈應該用更大既cost去acquire

但Flu又係更麻煩既一個題目, 因為vaccine可以唔中
而benefit亦唔係lifelong, likely一個endemic咁大把
件事唔似diphtheria, polio, 甚至幾乎因為vaccine而消失既smallpox咁clear cut
如果話好似買保險咁, 會出事就有賺, 無出事就比cost買個安心, 都講得通
但當無中就係vaccine呢件事有問題, 咁就有d輸打贏要

再另一個角度係public health既問題
好多大人中flu B未必好大件事
但傳染左比小朋友, 老人家可以死
係呢一方面flu vaccine就比較多數據支持
如果只係想講individual benefit就比較難講

非專家, 希望相關人士指教

replies.msg:
比左機會你自己收皮 係都要比人收皮既話 咁奉陪囉

http://www.info.gov.hk/gia/general/201604/20/P201604200699.htm

政府除了透過參與「疫苗資助計劃」的私家診所向65歲或以上長者提供資助的季節性流感疫苗注射外，已於二○一五／一六年度擴大了「政府防疫注射計劃」的涵蓋範圍至所有65歲或以上的長者，讓他們亦可透過公營醫療機構免費接種季節性流感疫苗，從而鼓勵長者接種疫苗。上述措施已見成效。截至二○一六年四月十日，上述兩項計劃為65歲或以上的長者接種的流感疫苗約有454,000劑，與上年同期比較增長22%。覆蓋率達目標長者人口的40%。政府會於二○一六／一七年度起將措施恆常化。

一七一八年未咁快有 不過一六年既數據已經夠屌打你呢條on9仔
